case_title: THAKOR, B. D. vs. OREN, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT OREN, GARY

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, B. D. THAKOR, SHALL RECEIVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 520 SOUTH VAN NESS, #146, SAN FRANCISCO, 94110 RENT AND DAMAGES OF $600.00 ARE ALSO AWARDED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT IT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL NOON, 10-1-94. IF DEFENDANT, GARY OREN, VACATES ROOM 146, AT 520 SOUTH VAN NESS BY NOON, 10-1-94, JUDGMENT WILL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL. EACH SIDE WILL WAIVE ALL CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER AND PAY THEIR OWN ATTORNEYS FEES. DEFENDANT, GARY OREN STATES HE IS THR ONLY OCCUPANT IN THE ROOM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OREN, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE #146 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. AND DEFT. SETTLE AND WAIVE ALL CLAIMS RESULTING FROM THIS ACTION. THERE IS A GENERAL RELEASE UNDER CIVIL CODE 1542. UPON FULL AND TIMELY COMPLIANCE BY DEFT. IN VACATING, JUDGMENT TO BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
